title: Add commit_all pathspec-exclusion unit test to test_scheduler_beads.py
description: In tests/test_scheduler_beads.py add a focused unit test that: (1) initialises a temporary git repo with a tracked .takt/beads/B-foo.json file, (2) modifies that file on disk, (3) calls WorktreeManager.commit_all() (or equivalent git add + git commit subprocess sequence matching the production code), (4) inspects the resulting commit via git show --stat or git diff HEAD~1..HEAD --name-only, and (5) asserts .takt/beads/B-foo.json does NOT appear in the diff. This directly verifies acceptance criterion #2 of spec-d1a1398c.
acceptance_criteria: New test exists in tests/test_scheduler_beads.py covering commit_all pathspec exclusion
Test modifies a .takt/beads/ file and asserts it is absent from the resulting commit diff
uv run pytest tests/test_scheduler_beads.py -q passes with no failures
